tool_args.label: Jamaica Bus Terminal Replacement - Modified Lease Terms (Feb 2026)
tool_args.raw_text: Modification to terms of long-term replacement facility lease for Jamaica Bus Terminal

payload.project_name: Modification to Terms of Long-Term Replacement Facility Lease for Jamaica Bus Terminal
payload.description: Modification of lease terms for Replacement Bus Terminal at 90-10 Merrick Boulevard, increasing base rent in exchange for concessions including removal of market rate rent adjustment in lease year 51, $1,250,000 landlord fit-out contribution, reduced purchase option at 80% of fair market value, and additional CPI-based caps

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 - Property Acquisition at 2340 Second Avenue
tool_args.raw_text: Acquisition of property located at 2340 Second Avenue in support of the Second Avenue Subway Project, Phase 2

payload.description: Acquisition of subsurface permanent easement and construction access license at 2340 Second Avenue (Senator Robert F. Wagner Senior Houses) for the construction of subway tunnels under Contract 2 of Phase 2

tool_args.label: Long-Term Lease for Replacement Jamaica Bus Terminal (Original 2023 Approval)
tool_args.raw_text: In October 2023, the MTA Board authorized MTAC&D's Transit-Oriented Development group ("TOD") to negotiate and enter into a Lease and D&C Agreement with FBE for the Jamaica Bus Terminal

payload.project_name: Long-Term Lease of Replacement Facility for Jamaica Bus Terminal
payload.description: October 2023 board authorization to negotiate and enter into a 90-year lease for the Replacement Bus Terminal at the site of the existing Jamaica Bus Terminal

tool_args.label: Temporary Jamaica Bus Terminal - GJDC Lease
tool_args.raw_text: MTA will enter into a lease with Greater Jamaica Development Corporation... at 90-01 168th Street, Jamaica, Queens... which will serve as swing space for bus operations pending the completion of the Replacement Bus Terminal. The GJDC Lease will provide for a fifteen (15) year lease term

payload.project_name: Lease with Greater Jamaica Development Corporation for Relocated Jamaica Bus Terminal
payload.description: Temporary Bus Terminal (swing space) lease with GJDC for 15-year term with termination option on fifth-year anniversary, to serve bus operations while Replacement Bus Terminal is under construction

tool_args.label: Robair Reichenstein (SAS Phase 2)
tool_args.raw_text: Project Manager Name ROBAIR REICHENSTEIN

tool_args.label: MTA Fit-Out Cost: $7.8M
tool_args.raw_text: MTA is responsible for the fit-out of the Premises following delivery of the core and shell by Lessor, at a cost estimated to be $7.8M (approximately $104 per square foot).

payload.description: MTA estimated cost for fit-out of Premises following Lessor's delivery of core and shell

tool_args.label: SAS Phase 2 Construction Access License: $60,000/year
tool_args.raw_text: $60,000 per year for a 3-year period, payable in a lump sum totaling $180,000, for the Construction Access License

tool_args.label: Permanent Easement Area: 19,314 sq ft
tool_args.raw_text: The Permanent Easement area is comprised of a 19,314 square foot volume of subsurface space, 42 feet wide and curved in shape, at a depth between 46.58 feet and 105.71 feet below ground level.

payload.raw_value_text: 19,314 square foot volume of subsurface space, 42 feet wide and curved in shape

tool_args.label: Construction Access License Area: 28,442 sq ft
tool_args.raw_text: The Construction Access License area is comprised of a volume of subsurface space that surrounds the curved permanent easement volume of 28,442 square feet and which extends from ground level to a depth of 115.71 feet below ground level.

tool_args.label: Existing Jamaica Bus Terminal operational challenges
tool_args.raw_text: The Existing Bus Terminal is comprised of a paved, open lot that has presented many operational challenges due to the configuration of the site.

payload.claim_text: The Existing Bus Terminal is comprised of a paved, open lot that has presented many operational challenges due to the configuration of the site.
payload.subject: Existing Jamaica Bus Terminal
payload.description: Existing bus terminal described as paved open lot with operational challenges

tool_args.label: Critical need for Replacement Bus Terminal
tool_args.raw_text: The relocation of bus operations back to the Replacement Bus Terminal is critical for bus operations in eastern Queens and western Nassau County as there are no alternate sites in downtown Jamaica for long-term bus operations.

payload.claim_text: The relocation of bus operations back to the Replacement Bus Terminal is critical for bus operations in eastern Queens and western Nassau County as there are no alternate sites in downtown Jamaica for long-term bus operations.
payload.subject: Replacement Bus Terminal
payload.description: Source states no viable alternatives exist for long-term bus operations in downtown Jamaica

tool_args.label: Bus Terminal Operators
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Bus and NYCT Bus, along with NICE (collectively, the "Bus Terminal Operators"), have operated the Existing Bus Terminal at the leased Location in eastern Queens for several decades.

payload.claim_text: MTA Bus and NYCT Bus, along with NICE (collectively, the 'Bus Terminal Operators'), have operated the Existing Bus Terminal at the leased Location in eastern Queens for several decades.
payload.subject: Bus Terminal Operators
payload.description: Statement that MTA Bus, NYCT Bus, and NICE have operated the existing terminal for decades

tool_args.label: Existing Bus Terminal has 25 bus bays
tool_args.raw_text: accommodating approximately 25 bus bays (the same as at the Existing Bus Terminal)

payload.claim_text: MTA will perform the fit-out work necessary to prepare the Replacement Bus Terminal for operation, which will include accommodating approximately 25 bus bays (the same as at the Existing Bus Terminal).
payload.subject: Replacement Bus Terminal
payload.description: Replacement Bus Terminal will accommodate approximately 25 bus bays, same as existing
